title: My Hero Academia: Crafted Justice
description: A mod inspired by the popular anime My Hero Academia. Discover your quirk, use skills seen in the anime and feel like a hero or a villain.
body:
# This is My Hero Academia in Minecraft.

This mod adds the world of **My Hero Academia** to Minecraft, allowing you to obtain a **quirk** that will allow you to use **multiple skills** that add a variety of **mechanics** and ways to play as well as **new items** and **costumes** so you can feel like your favorite **hero** or **villain**.

You can find out everything that is currently available in the mod by visiting the official [Wiki](https://my-hero-academia-crafted-justice.fandom.com/wiki/My_Hero_Academia:_Crafted_Justice_Wiki).

You can also join the mod's official [Discord](https://discord.gg/upqzBcRX) server to stay informed about new updates, ask any questions you may have, and connect with the community.

## Features

### Quirks:

One of the main features of **My Hero Academia: Crafted Justice** is its **quirks**, which allow the user to use a wide variety of skills that can do countless different things.

Strike with great force inherited from **One For All**, blow up everything in your path with **Explosion**, lift your enemies into the air with **Zero Gravity**, run at high speed with **Engine**, or become as hard as rock with **Hardening**. This is a small list of the quirks that the mod has to offer along with the things you can do with them. The mod currently has **30 different quirks** (visit the wiki to find out about all the available quirks and what they have to offer) - the possibilities are endless!

### Costumes:

Dress up just like your favorite hero or villain with a wide variety of new costumes, some even with additional features!

![All Might Costume](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a25b8d3f696881b29470488bed66155e9d94aae1.png) ![Dynamight Costume](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/caef24adaf85e817f23761cfff44c6a2be21dd2f.png) ![Deku Costume](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf6607434086ee9b1d21ae4840516851346fae4c.png) ![Red Riot Costume](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/043259037dcac5aadaf0217224db21c6dd1c5f8d.png) ![Uravity Costume](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f3ecad23af1724430ae3cc3d4010ffc6676bdad.png)

### Mobs:

**Meet the characters from My Hero Academia**, defeat **villains** to become a great hero, or cause chaos by taking on the **heroes**! Some mobs will give you **missions** to complete to earn your own reputation.

![Kamui Woods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9d15f994e57d0bee130426193e4e737a4f45eb6_0.webp) ![Mt. Lady](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/844631e823cb7b0535d4cde54b60da97e6c3fa31_0.webp) ![Thug3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cad04940dbbd5b9ae68be970e42dbaedb4186d89_0.webp) ![Thug6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ace2571abe3c503224bf92922ec27386ee6eeff.png)

### Structures:

Visit places inspired by the locations shown in the anime!

![City 1 Structure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/111d7c2e0ac7fffea1352adecb8df1934f6f5c5f_0.webp)

## Dependencies

Versions prior to version **0.3.0.0** require two additional mods to function, which are:

- [Kleiders Custom Renderer](https://modrinth.com/mod/kleiders-custom-renderer-api)
- [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

## And much more is coming soon!
